_comment: RemedyMatch funnel checkout catalog. Source of truth for PRICE (QBO Items carry no UnitPrice). Each product maps a funnel slug -> the existing QuickBooks Item id (realm 193514563989859) + price in cents. Prices populated 2026-05-30 from the specific-formulations Pinecone (exact-title matches). pinecone_title = the EXACT specific-formulations namespace title for the content layer (deterministic title-filter fetch; curated 2026-05-30 because fuzzy embedding mis-maps infoceuticals e.g. ESR). Add products / variants (larger bottles, cellophane refill packs) with their own qbo_item_id + price_cents. info_only items (Kloud, Centropix) use price_cents 0 + affiliate_url. | EXPANDED to all products from specific-formulations Pinecone (name/price/url/product_id); new entries have no qbo_item_id (created on first sale).
